cadence_note: UNODC republishes the CTS, GLOTIP, IAFQ and SDG bulk workbooks on an annual cycle keyed to the yearly UN Survey of Crime Trends collection round, but the portal gives no fixed release date and individual workbooks are restated out of band (the collected files here already span reference years 2021-2024). A quarterly refresh of the whole bulk-xlsx corpus catches a new reference year within one quarter of publication without polling a source that changes at most a few times a year. Source: https://dataunodc.un.org/
